positive: A maximalist botanical celestial pattern. Highly detailed illustration featuring interconnected elements: glowing stylized ferns, deep-sea bioluminescent jellyfish, geometric cosmic dust trails, and stylized crescent moons. The composition is centrally arranged and designed as a repeating, seamless tile print. Use a restricted, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, emerald green, ethereal gold, and muted teal. Style should be a blend of Art Nouveau curves and neo-retro sci-fi etchings. Crisp vector lines, perfect symmetry, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: low contrast, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, ugly, distorted, blurry, artifacts, text, signature, logo, watermark, extra limbs, noise, oversaturated, jpeg artifacts
